summary: The diff shows comprehensive implementation of all three requirements (REQ-15, REQ-16, REQ-17) in the frontend/standalone/ directory. All six HTML pages are present and link to styles.css and script.js via relative paths. The styles.css implements the Glassmorphism design system with correct colors, fonts, and responsive layouts. The script.js provides all required utility functions. No files outside frontend/standalone/ appear to have been modified. All core requirements appear to be satisfied.

hallucinated_features.description: Search and filter functionality on the Food Listings page (search input with oninput='filterListings()' and status filter dropdown)
hallucinated_features.reason: The requirements do not mention a search or filter bar on the Food Listings page — only that it reads from localStorage and displays donation cards.

hallucinated_features.description: Urgency Level field added to the Assistance Request Form
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-15 and REQ-17 specify the assistance form should have Recipient Name, Number of People, Items Required, and Delivery Address fields. An Urgency Level select field is present but was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Contact Number field added to the Assistance Request Form
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest specifies fields: Recipient Name, Number of People, Items Required, and Delivery Address. A Contact Number tel field is present but was not in the original spec.

hallucinated_features.description: Recent Donations and Recent Requests panels plus Volunteers grid rendered in the Dashboard beyond just stat counts
hallucinated_features.reason: The requirements only specify that the Dashboard shows live stats counted from localStorage entries. Rendering actual record lists and panels goes beyond the stated requirements.
